description: Cross-sprint operator debug findings from competition packaging Phase C.

entries.prevention: Pack tests main-on-tick→fn-3-block; CONCEPT lists bundled tick helpers on v2.0-async

entries.symptom: 137 ticks gate-true 0, collect append ok, window never full (runId 1d779790)

entries.fix: preserve fn-1/fn-1-block; repairAsyncV2InitialStartRecording; then-3 restart wiring

entries.rootCause: direct gate exec-out to async-upload-pipeline-block bypassed sequence

entries.rootCause: second gate cycle clip blob empty; console flood with DevTools open
